query: SELECT id, order_number, status, driver_id, created_at, driver_assigned_at FROM orders WHERE driver_id IS NULL AND status IN ('pending', 'accepted', 'ready_for_pickup') ORDER BY created_at ASC;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user TRWPPSjpVsMrzts.root --database HH4sKdeJGjocgFW8dJxnCN --execute SELECT id, order_number, status, driver_id, created_at, driver_assigned_at FROM orders WHERE driver_id IS NULL AND status IN ('pending', 'accepted', 'ready_for_pickup') ORDER BY created_at ASC;
